hero.description: Aetros is the deep-tech community for ESG — turning individual awareness into planetary impact.

story.title: Brand Story: AETROS
story.subtitle: Connecting Aether + Ethos into a global ESG community
story.p1: We are often told to "save the planet" as if Earth is something external, separate from ourselves.
story.p2: In truth, humanity and nature are not separate. We are all composed of the same elements and energy as the stars in the universe.
story.p3: Aetros believes that the true power to drive Environment, Social, and Governance (ESG) does not begin with regulations, rules, or report numbers... but erupts from "Your Inner Universe" — awareness, ideas, and every small action ready to create an extraordinary ripple.
story.p4: The name Aetros is born from merging Aether (the ancient substance weaving space) and Ethos (the moral compass of governance).
story.p5: When you move, the world moves — let's unleash the Big Bang of sustainability together.

bento.title: The Aetros Ecosystem
bento.subtitle: Every tool you need to create real impact

dashboard.title: Inner Universe
dashboard.desc: Eco-Avatar and Action Tracker to log daily ESG activities

community.title: Global Community
community.desc: Exchange knowledge, challenges, and green idea crowdsourcing

marketplace.title: Impact Rewards
marketplace.desc: Redeem Carbon Credits for badges, certificates, and partner discounts

knowledge.title: Knowledge Hub
knowledge.desc: ESG knowledge library for beginners to experts, including ESG Reports

workshop.title: Strategy Lab
workshop.desc: Interactive JTBD → VPC → BMC workshop to crystallize your business model
